title: Shh Me — Anonymous Crush
short_description: Someone has a secret about you. Anonymous heartbeats, filtered voices, blurred photos.
full_description:
Someone is thinking about you right now. They sent you their heartbeat — anonymously.

WHAT IS SHH ME?
Shh Me is an anonymous crush app. Send a "shh" (3-second heartbeat) to someone. They receive filtered voice messages, blurred photos that unblur day by day, and daily clues. Until the mutual reveal.

HOW IT WORKS
• Hold 3 seconds to send your heartbeat
• Exchange anonymous text messages
• Send filtered voice messages — your identity stays hidden
• Your photo unblurs progressively — 5 levels of mystery
• Receive 2 clues per day (morning question + afternoon hint)
• Both tap "Reveal" → numbers exchanged → Connected

PRIVACY FIRST
• Sender identity encrypted (AES-256) in a separate database
• Zero third-party tracking
• No ads. No data sold. Ever.
• 18+ only. AI-moderated content.
• GDPR & CCPA compliant

UNIQUE FEATURES
• "Le Souffle" — filtered voice that hides identity but preserves emotion
• Progressive photo blur — 5 levels, one per exchange
• Daily clues — AI-generated, never the same twice
• 5-second reveal countdown — cancel anytime
• 12-second shareable reveal video
• Offline mode — messages sync when back online

Download free. No subscription required.

Shh Me is not just another dating app. It is about the thrill of mystery, the courage to express feelings anonymously, and the magic of a mutual reveal. Whether you have a crush on a classmate, a colleague, or someone you met at a party — let them know without risking rejection.

Your secret is safe with us.
